name: Indri
habitatType: Tropical moist lowland and montane forest
conservationEfforts: Andasibe-Mantadia National Park protects core habitat. Community-based ecotourism provides economic alternatives. Madagascar's national parks expanded in 2003.
description: The largest living lemur, famous for its haunting whale-like songs that carry for kilometers through Madagascar's eastern rainforest. They have never survived in captivity.
